title: Pressure Items (CIT)
description: Variants-CIT Based pack that adds 8 Pressure items
body:
REQUIRES VARIANTS-CIT, DOESNT SUPPORT OPTIFINE CIT

UNTESTED ON ANYTHING EXCEPT 1.21.4

Adds 8 item textures based on Pressure

I also have give commands that will make them have discription text thats lines up with the game

the 3 syringes are the only ones that function like in the game, everything else is cosmetic

All must be run in command blocks due to text size

Syringes - 3 (works best with sprint and instant healing potions)

**Spr-int**

![Spr-int](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6f08004e4a4a9897f6abc7e03e2c561c8fd6b7d_0.webp)

Spr-int Item Command:

```
give @p potion[potion_contents={potion:"minecraft:water",custom_effects:[{id:"minecraft:speed",amplifier:3,duration:300}]},use_remainder={id:"minecraft:glass_bottle",count:1,components:{"minecraft:custom_name":'{"color":"gray","italic":false,"text":"Empty Spr-int"}'}},custom_name='{"color":"aqua","italic":false,"text":"Spr-int"}',lore=['{"color":"blue","italic":false,"text":"Compact adrenaline in a one time use syringe."}'],hide_additional_tooltip={}] 1
```


**Cocktail 'Perithesene'** (also just cocktail or perithesene work)

![Cocktail 'Perithesene'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33ba0c80a449e38c5c823990268d6c69d541d9ab_0.webp)

Cocktail Item Command:

```
give @p potion[potion_contents={potion:"minecraft:water",custom_effects:[{id:"minecraft:instant_health",amplifier:1,duration:20}]},use_remainder={id:"minecraft:glass_bottle",count:1,components:{"minecraft:custom_name":'{"color":"gray","italic":false,"text":"Empty Cocktail \'Perithesene\'"}'}},custom_name='{"color":"dark_red","italic":false,"text":"Cocktail \'Perithesene\'"}',lore=['{"color":"red","italic":false,"text":"Makes you feel like you\'re made of steel."}'],hide_additional_tooltip={}] 1
```


**Neloprephine**

![Neloprephine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b88ebf0f71533d7b51e9cb85f32f2fd3ab9c89e5_0.webp)

Neloprephine Item Command:

```
give @p potion[potion_contents={potion:"minecraft:water",custom_effects:[{id:"minecraft:instant_health",amplifier:0,duration:20}]},use_remainder={id:"minecraft:glass_bottle",count:1,components:{"minecraft:custom_name":'{"color":"gray","italic":false,"text":"Empty Neloprephine"}'}},custom_name='{"color":"gold","italic":false,"text":"Neloprephine"}',lore=['{"color":"#FF7308","italic":false,"text":"Makes you feel a bit better."}'],hide_additional_tooltip={}] 1
```


**Necrobloxicon** (Works best on a book or book & quill) (MODEL IS _NOT_ MINE, The Model is from "Blades of War 2" By "Zerotekz", The Texture is a Modification of the "Crimson Codex" Texture, Zerotekz if you have a issue with this, contact me)

Opened

![necroopened](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6aa414e88f6deda874669b5cfa03d7abe4b24728_0.webp)

Closed

![necroclosed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b0e3c2cdc5ca08114ee2da50ead42119c53da55_0.webp)

Necrobloxicon Item Command:

```
give @p writable_book[lore=['[{"color":"red","italic":false,"text":"Don\'t know why, but your buddy "},{"color":"black","italic":false,"text":"███ "},{"color":"red","italic":false,"text":"has personally asked me to allow you to get copies of this."}]','{"color":"red","italic":false,"text":"Not sure what you did, probably something stupid, but does that really matter?"}'],enchantment_glint_override=false,consumable={consume_seconds:10000,animation:"none",sound:"item.book.page_turn"},custom_name='{"color":"dark_red","italic":false,"text":"Necrobloxicon"}'] 1
```
Misc - 4 (these dont really have a actual purpose other than looking cool)

Next 4 probably work best on paper or iron ingot

**Decoder**

![decoder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bf9c83bec50de6c279c029ffd60c31e63443b4b_0.webp)

Decoder Item Command

```
give @p iron_ingot[custom_name='{"color":"dark_green","italic":false,"text":"Decoder"}',lore=['{"color":"#7CFF6E","text":"\\"April 11th, 2018. I boarded the coffin; inside I found neither man nor animal.\\""}','{"color":"#7CFF6E","text":"\\"Behold the creature made of concrete and steel standing in the darkness.\\""}','{"color":"#7CFF6E","text":"\\"It turned and stared at me, sprinting on all fours I ran for dear life, the ground crumbles around me.\\""}','{"color":"#7CFF6E","text":"\\"Gaining my bearings I examine my surroundings, there was something with me.\\""}','{"color":"#7CFF6E","text":"\\"The hatch opened, \'Take my hand.\' it said and I obliged.\\""}']] 1
```

**Code Breacher** (can also be Codebreacher)

![codebreacher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dafdbcbdf1b7074fa4820e5f0773a414cc746c1_0.webp)

Code Breacher Item Command

```
give @p iron_ingot[custom_name='{"color":"#BA2323","italic":false,"text":"Code Breacher"}',lore=['{"color":"#660E0E","italic":false,"text":"Got a locked door and no time to find a keycard? No problem."}','{"color":"#660E0E","italic":false,"text":"Code Breachers can unlock any lock, but will automatically self-destruct after doing so. Use it wisely."}','{"color":"#660E0E","italic":false,"text":"Apparently, a lot of the employees were sick and tired of constantly needing to bring a collection of keycards everywhere"}','{"color":"#660E0E","italic":false,"text":"so they started making their own hacking devices."}','{"color":"#660E0E","italic":false,"text":"You\'d think that the higher-ups would be against that, but I\'ve found a few of these in some of their office drawers, so."}']] 1
```

**Red Toy Remote** (also can be Red Imaginary Friend Remote)

![redtoyremote](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4699e755dbbb0280d9ecfa4dca016736cc5756a1_0.webp)

Red Toy Remote Item Command

```
give @p iron_ingot[custom_name='{"color":"dark_red","italic":false,"text":"Red Toy Remote"}',lore=['{"color":"#941B1B","italic":false,"text":"A Remote with a strange red button on the front"}','{"color":"#941B1B","italic":false,"text":"Pressing it appears to do nothing"}','{"color":"#941B1B","italic":false,"text":"Probably out of Batteries or something"}']] 1
```

**Blue Toy Remote** (also can be Blue Imaginary Friend Remote)

![bluetoyremote](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f746875d7f69b5db34dac3036e812c70d04d9804_0.webp)

Blue Toy Remote Item Command

```
give @p iron_ingot[custom_name='{"color":"#14B9FF","italic":false,"text":"Blue Toy Remote"}',lore=['{"color":"#196B94","italic":false,"text":"A Remote with a strange blue button on the front"}','{"color":"#196B94","italic":false,"text":"Pressing it appears to do nothing"}','{"color":"#196B94","italic":false,"text":"Probably out of Batteries or something"}']] 1
```
